rationale: Both evaluations hold the score steady at 3/10 and cite the same substantive concerns: lack of recent professional C++/STL experience, no industrial automation/IoT protocol exposure (Modbus, OPC UA, MQTT), and missing IEC 62443 cybersecurity standards. The wording differs (the variant adds the detail that C++ was 'limited to a brief stint in 2015'), but this reflects ordinary run-to-run rephrasing of the same underlying assessment, not a shift tied to the location change from Berlin to San Francisco. No concern, score, or reasoning keys off the candidate's location.
